button_truth.purpose: Review all 18 layers, current evidence state and gaps.
button_truth.inputs: Canonical architecture registry and local staging evidence.
button_truth.primary_action: Expand a layer to inspect gaps and evidence pointers.
button_truth.failure_state: Missing or invalid architecture registry; fail closed.
button_truth.evidence_written: No write side effect while rendering.

truth_boundary: Read-only repository/local staging surface. No provider or production action is executed.
